notes: v40: The porch/pavilion blocker is dead — verified in a real build this time, not just the editor. Two more root causes fixed on top of v38's mesh fix: the seat route-checker kept using a stale pre-purchase map reference (so every seat silently read as unreachable after buying an expansion), and a patron head-counter could drift and convince the game the tavern was full. The game now also logs a navigation health line after every rebuild so this class of bug can never hide again.
